All,

Three quick questions for everyone, since the thread is working through where the artifacts sit:

1) How does your work function without identity? If identity was a part of something else, how would this work?

2) Can this work validate external scope, or does it define its own?

3) How would this work in an open market with available web traffic and development?

One note of point, this thread feels more like an application design as opposed to a standards review.

Chris
